name: ernestdefoe/gridiron-nation
description: GridIron Nation — College football fan forum theme for Flarum 2. Crimson & DM Sans, organic radius, dark mode, live score widget.

suggest.ramon/colored: Per-tag color tinting on the hero + discussion list border stripes. GridIron Nation wires the data-colored-border=left/full integration without competing with the hero gradient.
suggest.ernestdefoe/recruiting: Powers the Top Recruits sidebar widget with live CollegeFootballData.com data + On3 photo headshots. Without this extension installed, the widget is hidden.
suggest.flarum/realtime: Self-hosted websocket daemon for live discussion list / notification / typing-indicator updates. GridIron Nation hides the 'N updates available' banner so the list refreshes silently.
